steps.title: Substitute x = 6 into the expression
steps.content: We have $b(x) = 2(x + 1)$. When $x = 6$, we substitute this value into the expression $(x + 1)$ that appears inside the function: $(6 + 1)$.

steps.title: Evaluate the result
steps.content: $(6 + 1) = 7$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
